zh.lifeSummary: 當Lord Hugh Bardolf於大約1145年出生在英國林可爾史爾格亞特 卡爾頓時，他的父親William Bardolf21歲，母親Amabilia De Lindsay17歲。他於大約1159年與Isabel de Condet在英國英格蘭艾可瑟洛可結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他去世於1176年在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾格亞特 卡爾頓享年32歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lord Hugh Bardolf于大约1145年出生在英国林可爾史爾格亞特 卡爾頓时，他的父亲William Bardolf21岁，母亲Amabilia De Lindsay17岁。他于大约1159年与Isabel de Condet在英国英格兰艾可瑟洛可结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和5个女儿的父母。他去世于1176年在英国英格兰林可爾史爾格亞特 卡爾頓享年32岁。

nameMeanings.name: Hugh
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French name, Hugues, Hugo, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from hug ‘heart, mind, spirit’. It was originally a short form of various compound names containing this element. This was borne by the aristocracy of medieval France, adopted by the Normans, and introduced by them to Britain. It was consistently one of the most popular boys' names in the Middle Ages in England, but fell out of favour in the 16th century until it was revived in the 20th century. Little Hugh of Lincoln was a child supposed in the Middle Ages to have been murdered by Jews in about 1255 , a legend responsible for several outbursts of anti-Semitism at various times. The story is referred to by Chaucer in The Prioress's Tale. He is not to be confused with St Hugh of Lincoln ( 1140–1200 ), bishop of Lincoln ( 1186–1200 ), who was noted for his charity and good works, his piety, and his defence of the Church against the State. Since the later Middle Ages Hugh has also been used as an Anglicized form of the Gaelic name Aodh .

en.lifeSummary: When Lord Hugh Bardolf was born about 1145, in Great Carlton, Lincolnshire, England, his father, William Bardolf, was 21 and his mother, Amabilia De Lindsay, was 17. He married Isabel de Condet about 1159, in Thurrock, Essex, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 5 daughters. He died in 1176, in Great Carlton, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 32.

Il a épousé Isabel de Condet environ 1159, à Thurrock, Essex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 5 filles. Il est décédé en 1176, à Great Carlton, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 32 ans.

ko.lifeSummary: Lord Hugh Bardolf(이)가 대략 1145년 영국 링코실르 그리트 칼턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Bardolf(은)는 21세였고, 그의 어머니 Amabilia De Lindsay(은)는 17세였다. 그는 대략 1159년 영국 잉글랜드 에세스 스록에서 Isabel de Condet(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1176년 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르 그리트 칼턴에서 32세의 나이로 사망했다.

Он женился на женщине по имени Isabel de Condet около 1159 г. в местности туррокк, эссекс, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 5 дочерей. Он умер в 1176 г. в местности грит карлтон, линколншир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 32 лет.
